wrongif_alerts.wrongIf_e: CELESTIAL Phase 3 uMRD data disappoints (<50% rate) OR Brukinsa US BTK inhibitor market share drops below 15% OR revenue_growth < 20% for 2 consecutive quarters
wrongif_alerts.wrongIf_z: CELESTIAL三期uMRD数据不及预期(<50%)，或布鲁替尼美国BTK市占率跌破15%，或连续两季度营收增速<20%
wrongif_alerts.note_e: Binary event condition — manual monitoring required: CELESTIAL Phase 3 uMRD data disappoints (<50% rate) OR Brukinsa US BTK inhibitor
wrongif_alerts.note_z: 二元事件条件——需人工监控：CELESTIAL Phase 3 uMRD data disappoints (<50% rate) OR Brukinsa US BTK inhibitor

wrongif_alerts.wrongIf_e: revenue_growth < -10% for 2 consecutive quarters (tariff impact proxy) OR gross_margin drops below 15% OR earnings_growth < -40%
wrongif_alerts.wrongIf_z: 连续两季度营收增速<-10%（关税冲击代理指标），或毛利率跌破15%，或盈利增速<-40%

wrongif_alerts.wrongIf_e: revenue_growth < -10% for 2 consecutive quarters (tariff impact proxy) OR gross_margin drops below 15% OR earnings_growth < -40%

wrongif_alerts.wrongIf_e: earnings_growth < -30% for 2 consecutive quarters OR Japan revenue contribution fails to reach 15% of total by Q4 2026
wrongif_alerts.wrongIf_z: 连续两季度盈利增速<-30%，或日本营收贡献未在2026年Q4前达到总收入15%

wrongif_alerts.wrongIf_e: 1.6T mass production delayed beyond Q3 2026 OR NVDA+MSFT+GOOGL stock prices collectively drop >25% from ATH within 1 quarter (hyperscaler CapEx pullback proxy)
wrongif_alerts.wrongIf_z: 1.6T量产推迟至2026年Q3后，或英伟达/微软/谷歌股价集体较ATH下跌>25%（超大规模CapEx削减代理指标）
